shopping_241.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to identify and extract the link for an image showing the Serrano Ham Bone from a different angle. Instead, it returned the link to the primary product image, which was not "another angle" as requested by the objective.
shopping_241.REFLECTION: When the objective requires an image from "another angle," always navigate to the product detail page and carefully examine all available image thumbnails or gallery options. Do not simply return the link of the main product image. Prioritize finding a distinct image that clearly shows a different perspective of the product.
